nasb.text: When they came to the land of Zuph, Saul said to his servant who was with him, “Come, and let us return, or else my father will cease to be concerned about the donkeys and will become anxious for us.”

esv.text: When they came to the land of Zuph, Saul said to his servant who was with him, “Come, let us go back, lest my father cease to care about the donkeys and become anxious about us.”

cnv.text: 他們到了蘇弗地，掃羅對跟隨他的僕人說：“來，我們回去吧，恐怕我父親不為母驢掛心，反而為我們擔憂了。”

ccb.text: 最后，他们来到苏弗，扫罗对仆人说：“我们还是回家去吧，恐怕我父亲不再为驴担心，反而为我们担心。”
